Shield Bash.description: Bash an enemy and block damage from their next strike.

Power Strike.description: Strike an enemy with the force of the Sultan!

Sandstorm Strike.description: The desert is fierce during the day, strike an enemy with that ferocity.

Howl.description: Wolves call out to their prey before they strike

Taunt.description: Your enemy is enamored and infuriated by your insults

Eye of Jaleel.description: Jaleel caught the eyes of all the world, yet only one caught the eye of the Great Djinn of Wealth, the Earth herself.

Crest of the Sun.description: The sun is the glorius bringer of life, the unrelenting truth of our kingdom, and the father of the desert!
